Class Notification

java.lang.Object
notification.Notification
Direct Known Subclasses:
NotificationDiscount, NotificationEmployeeExchange, NotificationEmployeeOrder, NotificationEmployeeValuation, NotificationExchange, NotificationNewSecondHand, NotificationOrder, NotificationPackCart, NotificationPayment, NotificationProductCart
public abstract class Notification extends Object
It implements the notification

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Notification(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment)
    Notification(String assignedTitle, String assignedText, LocalDateTime timeMade, LocalDateTime assignedTimeReceived, boolean assignedRead, boolean assignedVisible, NotificationType assignedType)
    Creates a new notification
    Notification(LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
    Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    getType()
    Obtains the type of notification
    boolean

    Obtains whether the user has erased this notification
    void
    setVisible(boolean visible)
    Marks whether the notification has been erased or not
    String
    signOff()
    The sign-off of all the store notifications
    String
    timeLog()
    Calculates the amount of time that has passed since the user received the notification

  • Constructor Details

    • Notification

      public Notification(String assignedTitle, String assignedText, LocalDateTime timeMade, LocalDateTime assignedTimeReceived, boolean assignedRead, boolean assignedVisible, NotificationType assignedType)
      Creates a new notification
      Parameters:
      assignedTitle - the title of the notification
      assignedText - the message in the notification
      timeMade - the time it was made
      assignedTimeReceived - the time it was received
      assignedRead - whether the user has read it or not
      assignedVisible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      assignedType - the type of notification

    • Notification

      public Notification(String title, String text, LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
      Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment)
      Parameters:
      title - the tile of the notification
      text - the message in the notification
      timeReceived - the time it was received
      read - whether the user has read it or not
      visible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      type - the type of notification

    • Notification

      public Notification(LocalDateTime timeReceived, boolean read, boolean visible, NotificationType type)
      Creates a new notification with default timeMade (this moment) and no content
      Parameters:
      timeReceived - the time it was received
      read - whether the user has read it or not
      visible - if the notification has been erased by the user (thus no longer visible for them)
      type - the type of notification

  • Method Details

    • isVisible

      public boolean isVisible()
      Obtains whether the user has erased this notification
      Returns:
      the visible true if it hasn't been erased, false if else

    • setVisible

      public void setVisible(boolean visible)
      Marks whether the notification has been erased or not
      Parameters:
      visible - the visible to set

    • getType

      public NotificationType getType()
      Obtains the type of notification
      Returns:
      the type of notification

    • timeLog

      public String timeLog()
      Calculates the amount of time that has passed since the user received the notification
      Returns:
      a string with the amount of time since the notification was received (hh/mm/ss)

    • signOff

      public String signOff()
      The sign-off of all the store notifications
      Returns:
      a string with the store sign-off
